content:
# Best AI Productivity Tools for Project Managers in 2026

Project managers have a lot on their plate. AI productivity tools can help you plan better, communicate clearer, and deliver projects on time!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more tools.

---

## Notion AI: Your All-in-One Workspace

Notion AI turns Notion into an AI-powered project management powerhouse.

It helps with meeting notes, project plans, documentation, and more.

### Why Notion AI for PMs?
- **Meeting summaries**: Auto-generate summaries from your notes
- **Project plans**: Create project outlines with AI assistance
- **Documentation**: Keep all project docs in one place with AI search

---

## [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]: Project Management Supercharged

[[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] adds AI features to ClickUp's already powerful project management platform.

It helps with task creation, summarization, and even writing updates for your team.

### ClickUp AI Features
- **AI task creation**: Turn ideas into actionable tasks
- **Summarize threads**: Get the gist of long conversations quickly
- **Custom fields**: AI can help fill in project details

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Plan |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| Notion AI | All-in-one workspace | $8/mo | Yes (limited) |
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project management | $7/mo | Yes |
| [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]] | Task management | $4/mo | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **All-in-one solution**: Go with Notion AI
- **Pure project management**: Try [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]
- **Simple task management**: Use [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]]

Ready to become a more effective project manager? Try these tools today!

For more insights, check out our guide: Best AI Productivity Tools 2026
